name: Data Table
description: Sortable, filterable, paginated data table with a toolbar for search, filters, and bulk actions.

default.description: Sortable, filterable, paginated data table with a toolbar for search, filters, and bulk actions.

slots.toolbar: Horizontal bar with search Input, filter Select, action Buttons via _flex _gap3 _justifyBetween
slots.table: DataTable instance with columns, data, sort, and pagination props
slots.bulk-actions: Conditional bar shown when rows selected, with Buttons and Badge count

audit-log.description: Audit log table with severity Badge column, color-coded rows, and log-level filter. Used for audit trails and system logs.

slots.filter-bar: Severity filter Select + date range + search
slots.table: DataTable with severity Badge column, timestamp, actor, action, target columns
slots.legend: Optional severity level legend with color indicators

master-detail.description: Split layout with data table on the left and a detail panel on the right. Selecting a row populates the detail view. Used for CRMs, admin panels, and record browsers.

slots.table: DataTable spanning 2 columns with row selection enabled
slots.detail: Card panel spanning 1 column showing selected row details

editable.description: Inline-editable data table with add row, edit, and delete actions. Input fields appear directly in table cells for quick data entry.

slots.toolbar: Add row Button and save/discard actions
slots.table: DataTable with editable Input cells, inline edit/delete action column

slots.toolbar: Horizontal bar with search Input, filter Select, action Buttons via _flex _gap3 _justifyBetween
slots.table: DataTable instance with columns, data, sort, and pagination props
slots.bulk-actions: Conditional bar shown when rows selected, with Buttons and Badge count
